name: analysis-history
description: Runtime metadata for analysis history — recent normalization events, extraction events, generation events, and failure records.
note: This file is generated automatically by the Layer 5 AI Analysis Layer. No existing code depends on it yet.

normalizationRecord.description: Schema for each normalization record in recentNormalizations

fields.module: string — normalization module (html, css, media, url)
fields.inputSizeBytes: number — input HTML size in bytes
fields.outputSizeBytes: number — output HTML size in bytes

extractionRecord.description: Schema for each extraction record in recentExtractions

fields.module: string — extraction module (dom, gemini, seo, cms)
fields.faqExtracted: number — number of FAQ items extracted

generationRecord.description: Schema for each generation record in recentGenerations

fields.module: string — generation module (json, cms, seo, report)

failureRecord.description: Schema for each failure record in recentFailures
